translations.en: the daemon Sin'Vraal.
translations.zh: 惡魔辛弗拉。

translations.en: "Good $T, $G. What seek you?"
translations.zh: 「$T好，$G。汝尋何物？」

translations.en: "I am Sin'Vraal."
translations.zh: 「吾乃辛弗拉。」

translations.en: "No job, $G. I am @free to wander where I wish."
translations.zh: 「無職，$G。吾@free（自）由，可隨意遊蕩。」

translations.en: "Among my @people, those who can fly rule."
translations.zh: 「在吾的@people（族人）之中，能飛者統治一切。」

translations.en: "Though I have wings, I cannot @fly. So I was a slave."
translations.zh: 「雖然吾有翅膀，卻不能@fly（飛翔）。因此吾曾是奴隸。」

translations.en: "Here I am free!"
translations.zh: 「在這裡吾是自由的！」

translations.en: "I am not a daemon, though humans think so."
translations.zh: 「吾並非惡魔，雖然人類如此以為。」

translations.en: "I am a @gargoyle."
translations.zh: 「吾是@gargoyle（魔像族）。」

translations.en: "I fled here to the Underworld because I was not free among the gargoyles."
translations.zh: 「吾逃到地下世界，因為在魔像族中吾沒有自由。」

translations.en: "The Book of Prophecies says that the False Prophet will come to destroy the gargoyle race."
translations.zh: 「《預言之書》記載，偽先知將到來，摧毀魔像族。」

translations.en: "Only the @sacrifice of the False Prophet will save us."
translations.zh: 「唯有偽先知的@sacrifice（獻祭），方能拯救吾等。」

translations.en: "Because I could not @fly, I was never taught to read."
translations.zh: 「因為吾不能@fly（飛翔），所以從未被教導讀書。」

translations.en: "Sacrifice means many things in my language."
translations.zh: 「獻祭在吾的語言中有許多含義。」
translations.note: 避免「許」作尾字：此處「許多含義」為四字，「義」為尾字，安全

translations.en: "You should seek out a gargoyle scholar to learn more."
translations.zh: 「汝應尋訪魔像族學者以獲取更多資訊。」

translations.en: "Travel the other side of the world, and you should be able to find one."
translations.zh: 「前往世界的另一端，汝應能找到一位。」

translations.en: "You can go down through Hythloth to get to the realm of gargoyles."
translations.zh: 「汝可穿越希斯洛斯下行，進入魔像族的領域。」

translations.en: "There are two kinds of gargoyles: winged ones and wingless ones."
translations.zh: 「魔像族分兩種：有翅者與無翅者。」

translations.en: "Wingless ones are mute and unintelligent. They do all the manual labor."
translations.zh: 「無翅者啞口且無智，承擔所有體力勞動。」

translations.en: "Winged ones are smart, and do all the planning and leading."
translations.zh: 「有翅者聰慧，負責所有謀劃與領導。」

translations.en: "Being able to fly is, to them, a sign of @intelligence."
translations.zh: 「在他們看來，能飛翔是@intelligence（智慧）的象徵。」

translations.en: "Even the @Temple can only be reached by air."
translations.zh: 「甚至連@Temple（神殿）也只能從空中抵達。」

translations.en: "Yes, a strange concept this."
translations.zh: 「是的，這是個奇特的觀念。」

translations.en: "Yet as some in Minoc can tell you, flying can be achieved by anyone."
translations.zh: 「然而如敏諾克的某些人會告訴汝，飛翔乃人人可達成之事。」

translations.en: "The great Temple of Singularity held the Codex."
translations.zh: 「偉大的獨一神殿曾供奉知識寶典。」

translations.en: "The Temple is the most holy gargoyle place."
translations.zh: 「神殿是魔像族最神聖的場所。」

translations.en: "A human could learn much by traveling there."
translations.zh: 「人類若前往那裡，定能學到良多。」

translations.en: "But you could never get to the temple."
translations.zh: 「但汝永遠無法抵達神殿。」

translations.en: "Not only is it deep below the surface, but it can only be reached by flying."
translations.zh: 「它不僅深埋於地下，而且只能從空中抵達。」

translations.en: "And you cannot fly any more than I can."
translations.zh: 「而汝與吾同樣無法飛翔。」

translations.en: "Yes, I once met a pirate here in the desert."
translations.zh: 「是的，吾曾在沙漠中遇到一個海盜。」

translations.en: "He seemed to be hunting me, but he got dragged off by the @ants!"
translations.zh: 「他似乎在追獵吾，但被@ants（螞蟻）拖走了！」

translations.en: "The great desert ants build huge mounds, and are very dangerous!"
translations.zh: 「巨型沙漠螞蟻築起龐大的蟻丘，極為危險！」

translations.en: "May your persistence and precision lead to success, $G!"
translations.zh: 「願汝以堅毅與精確走向成功，$G！」

translations.en: "I know nothing of $Z, $G."
translations.zh: 「吾對$Z一無所知，$G。」

translator_notes: 辛弗拉是無翅的自由魔像族，逃至沙漠。提供重要的魔像族社會結構資訊（有翅/無翅、神殿、預言之書）。用文言敬語（「汝/吾」）表現其莊重外星文化感。
